intro: Anthropic is expanding access to its Mythos model beyond a controlled beta, with the company reaching a $965 billion valuation and planning wider availability within weeks. The move comes alongside the release of Claude Opus 4.8, though some users report the model exhibits overly cautious behavior. Meanwhile, Dell's AI server revenue surged 757% year-over-year, and Samsung began shipping next-generation HBM4E memory chips as infrastructure demand accelerates across the sector.

whitelist.title: Anthropic’s Guarded Mythos Model Is Headed For Wider Release
whitelist.desc: Anthropic is accelerating the rollout of Mythos, a powerful AI model that it had previously only shared in a controlled environment with major technology companies and cybersecurity researchers.
